semantic_description: Scalar-only nonnegative exponentiation. The function initializes ans to 1, iterates a for loop from i = 0 while i < exp, multiplies ans by base once per iteration, and returns power_nonnegative_z(base@pre, exp@pre). The contract restricts exp to be nonnegative and supplies an INT range guard for every prefix power from 0 through exp, so each intermediate multiplication result is representable as a C int. The loop may be empty when exp is 0. The function does not access or modify heap memory.
